name: Fuxin Dare Automotive Parts Co., Ltd.
summary: Fuxin Dare Automotive Parts Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of automotive components in China. Its principal products include pumps and electric pumps, motors, electronic control and automotive electronics, noise reduction insulation, and lightweight products used in steering, transmission, braking, automotive electronics, and body. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Fuxin, China.
